history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. To my right (east) there is an empty floor cell (.). I will turn right to face that direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is an empty floor (`.`), so moving forward is safe. To my left is lava (`L`), and to my right is a wall (`#`). The goal is not yet visible, so I need to explore forward to reveal more of the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The updated observation shows the agent at the bottom-center facing up, with an empty floor cell directly ahead. The cells to the left and right are lava and a wall, respectively, so the only safe direction to explore is forward. No goal is visible yet, so moving forward will reveal more of the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom-center facing up. Directly ahead is an empty floor cell ('.'). To the left is lava ('L') and to the right is a wall ('#'). The goal is not visible yet, so moving forward is the only safe action to explore the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 6, col 4) is an empty floor tile ('.'), safe to step on. The cell to the left is lava ('L'), and the cell to the right is a wall ('#'). The goal is not yet visible. Moving forward is the only safe action to continue exploring the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is lava (L), which is deadly. To the right is a wall (#), and to the left is an empty floor (.). No goal is visible. The only safe action is to turn left to face the floor cell for exploration.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly in front is a safe floor ('.'), and the path upward stays clear of lava. Moving forward will bring the agent closer to the goal (G) visible at the top right of the observation.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of the agent is a safe floor ('.'). The goal 'G' is visible in the top-right area, and moving forward will bring the agent closer to it along a clear vertical path. There is lava on both sides, so moving forward is the only safe and productive action.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of the agent (north) is a safe floor ('.'). Continuing forward will progress along a clear vertical path to row 2, from which the goal 'G' can be reached by turning right and moving east. All cells along this path are visible and safe.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of the agent (north) is a safe floor ('.'). Moving forward will progress along a clear path toward the goal 'G'. From the current position (row 6, col 3), moving north leads to row 5, col 3 (safe), then row 4, col 3 (safe), and row 3, col 3 (safe). From there, turning right and moving east twice leads to the goal at (3,5) without encountering lava. The immediate forward move is safe and beneficial.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north) is a safe floor ('.') at row 5, col 3. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal G without encountering lava. The goal is at row 4, col 5, and this path leads safely toward it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,3) facing north. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor ('.'), so moving forward brings me closer to the goal G at (5,5) without stepping on lava. The path ahead is clear.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, col 3 facing north. The goal G is at row 6, col 6. I need to move east. I will turn right to face east, then move forward along the safe floor cells to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is two cells directly in front of me, with a safe floor cell immediately ahead. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without encountering lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 3, facing north. The cell directly in front of me is the goal G. Moving forward will safely reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
